endpoints.name: Sentiment analysis service
endpoints.description:
Sample request:
            
    POST /Analyze
    {
       "DocumentText": "Excellent location, opposite a very large mall with wide variety of shops, restaurants and more.",
       "PrivateKey": "your_api_key",
       "Secret": ""
    }
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TEXT2DATA_API_KEY}} with your TEXT2DATA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Document categorization service
endpoints.description:
Sample request:
            
    POST /Categorize
    {
       "DocumentText": "Excellent location, opposite a very large mall with wide variety of shops, restaurants and more.",
       "PrivateKey": "your_api_key",
       "UserCategoryModelName": "your_model_name",
       "Secret": ""
    }
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TEXT2DATA_API_KEY}} with your TEXT2DATA API KEY.
